title: World of Neurons
description: MSNeuro helps students and researchers learn faster with curated modules, practical EEG workflows, and a blog section focused on real-world applications.

sections.title: Fundamentals
sections.description: Build strong neuroscience foundations with structured concepts and visuals.

sections.title: Preprocessing
sections.description: Learn practical EEG cleaning, filtering, artifact removal, and feature prep.

sections.title: Resources
sections.description: Get curated tools, libraries, papers, and learning material in one place.

sections.title: Public Datasets
sections.description: Browse open datasets useful for BCI experiments and ML model building.

sections.title: Opportunities
sections.description: Discover labs, internships, and research collaborations in neurotech.

sections.title: Blog
sections.description: Read practical posts on neuroscience workflows and project ideas.
